worldData.instructions:
ALEMBIC — an alchemy of living matter.

DRAG anything into anything — some pairs become something new. No keys; a pointer is enough.

Fire spends itself down to CHAR — a breath of GALE rekindles it. Water quenches what it touches. Like refuses like unless THROWN.

A book of fusions hides in the vessel; every creation has a further use. Water the MOSS and it doubles — left alone, life slowly greens the glass. Only the STAR is final — and it must be provoked.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: ALEMBIC: pooled-field chemistry — drag, fuse, discover
